ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - Psychology
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - Psychology[/h1] [b]📚 [url=https://github.com/RimSynapse/RimSynapse-Psychology/wiki]Official Wiki & Documentation[/url][/b]
[b]True AI-Driven Personalities, Dynamic Memories, and Evolving Mental States.[/b]
RimSynapse Psychology leverages the power of Local LLMs to completely overhaul how pawns think, feel, and react. Colonists are no longer just a collection of static traits; they are living, breathing entities with deep backstories, evolving psychological profiles, and unique interpretations of every event on the Rim.
[h2]Core Systems[/h2] [list] [*] [b]AI-Generated Backstories:[/b] When a colonist joins, the LLM weaves their vanilla childhood and adulthood into a rich, first-person autobiography and assigns psychological archetype traits. [*] [b]Nightly Clinical Evaluation:[/b] Every night when a pawn falls asleep, their entire day - average mood, survival stats, lifetime kills, and memories - is sent to the LLM for a formal psychological assessment across 8 categories (Relationships, Trauma, Satisfaction, etc.). [*] [b]Dynamic Memory System:[/b] Major events (raids, marriages, deaths, legendary crafts) generate personalized 1-2 sentence memories for colonists. Each memory carries weighted tags (e.g. [Food], [Resentment], [Combat]) and a decay rate. [*] [b]Desensitization Engine:[/b] The LLM receives a pawn's lifetime statistics (kills, damage taken, time as colonist) alongside their current psychological burdens. A pawn's first kill is traumatizing; their 25th is just another day. The AI decides. [*] [b]Defining Memories:[/b] Life-altering events (marriages, first kills, deaths of close friends) are flagged with zero decay - they never fade. These defining memories permanently shape a pawn's psychology. [*] [b]Tag Correlation Analysis:[/b] Instead of dumping raw memories to the LLM, the system aggregates memory weights by tag and reports top psychological burdens (e.g. "[Death]: Weight 8.5, 14 incidents"). This provides context without overloading the AI. [/list]
[h2]Mental States[/h2] [list] [*] [b]AI-Driven Trait Evolution:[/b] The LLM can add or remove vanilla traits over time based on a pawn's experiences, sending the player a letter explaining the psychological reasoning. [*] [b]Functional Depression:[/b] Pawns experiencing extreme despair may still go to work and sleep, but completely refuse to eat, requiring immediate intervention before they fade away. [*] [b]Abandonment Risk:[/b] The nightly evaluation produces an Abandonment Risk Score (0-100). If it exceeds 90, the pawn may permanently leave the colony. [*] [b]The "Snap Out Of It" Mechanic:[/b] Driven by the pawn's traits, survival instinct can override extreme mental states if they sustain too much pain or malnutrition. [*] [b]Under Development (Debug Only):[/b] We are actively experimenting with highly complex psychological states, including "Suicidal", "PTSD Trauma Triggers", and "Reckless Euphoria". These are currently [b]disabled[/b] in normal gameplay but exist in the mod for testing via Debug mode. [/list]
[h2]Interactive Psychology[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Player-Driven Therapy Sessions:[/b] Direct pawns to counsel one another on couches or chairs. The AI can autonomously generate a flowing dialogue between the two pawns based on their intelligence and ideologies, or you can step in with a "Guiding Hand" to type your own responses. [*] [b]Psychological Recruitment:[/b] Use the Therapy system to engage in deep conversation with prisoners, visitors, and faction leaders to organically sway their allegiance or ideology. [*] [b]Psychology Tab:[/b] Open the new Psychology gizmo on any colonist to read their inner thoughts, backstory, memories, clinical assessment, and full transcripts of recent therapy sessions. [*] [b]Visitor Backstories:[/b] Important NPCs (faction leaders, prisoners, royalty, family members) also get LLM-generated backstories during idle processing time. [/list]
[h2]Default Settings (adjustable in-game via Mod Settings -> RimSynapse Psychology)[/h2] [code] Memory Decay Rate Multiplier: 1.0x (Higher = memories fade faster, Lower = memories linger) Sensitivity Burden Threshold: 0.5 (Minimum tag weight before the LLM considers it a psychological burden) Enable Suicidal Behaviors: true (Sensitive content toggle - disabling removes all suicidal mental states) [/code]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Harmony[/b] [*] [b]RimSynapse Core[/b] (Must be loaded before this mod) [*] A running local LLM backend via LM Studio or Ollama. [/list]
[h2]Support the Project[/h2] If you enjoy the psychological depth this mod brings to RimWorld, consider buying me a coffee! [url=https://buymeacoffee.com/archdukejim]Buy me a coffee[/url]
